content.en:
"It's coming!"

Under the probe of Ye Tian's life pupil power, the Blood Wolf Heavenly Venerable had already approached.

At this time, Lord Yunlan also felt a crisis in the dark.

"Everyone, be on alert!"

Yunlan Juggernaut shouted.

Whoa!!

Everyone stopped resting one after another, and urged the defensive array with all their strength, which showed how well everyone in the Yunmeng Mist Mercenary Group cooperated, if it was someone else, they would definitely ask the Yunlan master, but they didn't have any doubts, and immediately took action.

I have to say that the prestige of the Yunlan Juggernaut in the Yunmeng Mist Mercenary Group is very high.

"Hahaha, Master Yunlan, let's meet again!"

A wild laugh was heard.

The next moment.

Blood Wolf Tianzun led the people of the Blood Wolf Mist Mercenary Group to appear in front of the Yunlan Master.

"Blood Wolf Heavenly Venerable, how did you find us?"

Yunlan was shocked.

She was in the misty area that she had entered from a different position than the Blood Wolf Tianzun, and she could fly away in the other direction, and she didn't know how many directions had changed in the middle.

The outer areas of the Misty Region are very large, even larger than the entire Sea of Chaos.

In such an area, how can the Blood Wolf Heavenly Venerable track it?

Ye Tian also looked at the Blood Wolf Tianzun, and he noticed that the few cosmic gods who had joined the Blood Wolf Mist Mercenary Group had disappeared.

"It is estimated that he was killed by the Blood Wolf Tianzun, or deliberately arranged to be sent to death!"

Ye Tian guessed.

From the mouth of the Yunlan master, I learned that the Blood Wolf Mist Mercenary Group is one of the few Mist Mercenary Group that rarely recruits temporary members, because there are many people in the Blood Wolf Mist Mercenary Group, and there are as many as fifteen people in the Juggernaut alone, plus the strength of the Blood Wolf Tianzun himself Tianzun level, such a strength is already very strong.

Blood Wolf Tianzun doesn't need to improve his cultivation talent, so there is no need to fight so hard, he will basically only roam in the periphery or a little area inside, coupled with cruelty, even if he encounters danger, he will only use the weak cosmic god as cannon fodder behind the palace, so he will live well.

Therefore, the Blood Wolf Mist Mercenary Group rarely recruits temporary groups, and few people dare to join the Blood Wolf Mist Mercenary Group, once there are no members, Blood Wolf Tianzun will only forcibly capture some cosmic gods and forcibly control them.

The previous few cosmic gods didn't understand the situation and joined the Blood Wolf Mist Mercenary Group, and the Yunlan Juggernaut naturally wouldn't remind a few traitors.

Now it seems that the Blood Wolf Tianzun is obviously not very worried about those cosmic gods, plus those cosmic gods have low sin karma, and they are not evildoers, which is not in line with the concept of the Blood Wolf Mist Mercenary Group.

Therefore, it was impossible for the Blood Wolf Heavenly Venerable to keep those few cosmic gods, and he would definitely kill them.

Ye Tian didn't sympathize with those cosmic gods, in the universe, if he stood on the wrong team, it could only be said to be unlucky.

"There is a traitor among us, he must be him!"

One of the cosmic gods of the Yunmeng Mist Mercenary Group pointed at Ye Tian and shouted.

This cosmic god was the one who Ye Tian had confirmed to be a traitor before, but now he bit Ye Tian back.

Whew!!

Everyone in the Yunmeng Mist Mercenary Group glared at Ye Tian one by one, and even the Yunlan Juggernaut frowned and looked at Ye Tian, "Fatian Juggernaut, isn't it you?"

It was normal for her to be suspicious, after all, Ye Tian was the master of the ultimate cultivation, why did he join the Yunmeng Mist Mercenary Group?

Although Ye Tian explained it before, that explanation was too far-fetched.

If Ye Tian is a member of the Blood Wolf Mist Mercenary Group, and the Yunmeng Mist Mercenary Group is acting as an undercover agent, then it makes perfect sense.

In the outside world, the blood wolf didn't dare to kill the Yunlan master, because it was easy to expose, and once it was discovered, the top Heavenly Venerables who were familiar with the father of the Yunlan master might chase and kill the blood wolf.

But if in the misty area, the blood wolf killed the Yunlan master, then no one would be able to detect it.

How dangerous the misty area is, the supreme has fallen, and it is too normal for a master to die in the misty area.

Therefore, the blood wolf really wanted to kill the Yunlan Juggernaut in the misty area.

In any way, it is too likely that Ye Tian is undercover.

"If you think about it this way, it's really possible that I'm undercover!"

Ye Tian thought.

Facing the questioning of the Yunlan master, Ye Tian said lightly: "No!"

"You said you weren't a traitor, so how could Blood Wolf Tianzun find out here?"

The cosmic god asked again.

"Believe it or not!"

Ye Tian said coldly.

He didn't bother to explain anything to a swarm of ants.

Blood Wolf Tianzun still didn't make a move immediately, but just surrounded the people of the Yunmeng Mist Mercenary Group.

He knew very well that the strength of Yunlan Juggernaut was not weak, maybe not as good as Tianzun, but he might have some hole cards left by her father, and if there were treasures like escape, it would be easy to escape.

To be sure, he must make sure that the Yunlan Juggernaut cannot escape.

Moreover, that undercover agent deliberately caused a conflict between Ye Tian and Yun Lan Juggernaut, which was exactly what he wanted, if the two fought, he could even sneak attack and kill Yun Lan Juggernaut in an instant.

"I believe in you!"

Yunlan Juggernaut said suddenly.

At this moment, Ye Tian was a little surprised.

After all, no matter how you look at it, he is too suitable for the characteristic of undercover, but Yunlan Juggernaut believes him.

"Why do you believe I'm not a traitor, not an undercover agent?"

Ye Tian asked curiously.

"Intuition!" Yun Lan dominated: "And the Blood Wolf Heavenly Venerable has come, my hope of escaping is very low, and you are also the ultimate master, and although I can't feel your strength, it should not be weaker than me." If you were a traitor, you could have inflicted a heavy blow on me in an instant, or even destroy the entire defensive formation, but you didn't do anything. "

"Commander, you can't be deceived by this person, he must be a traitor!"

The cosmic god said again.

"Go ahead, I'll open a route for you and try to get you out!"

Yun Lan dominated.

"Sister Commander, I'm not leaving!"

The Plum Garden Juggernaut cried.

That's when it happened.

The cosmic god suddenly withdrew the defensive formation, and instantly turned into a ray of light and rushed towards the Blood Wolf Heavenly Venerable.

"Meet the Blood Wolf Heavenly Venerable!"

The cosmic god bowed.

"Yinsha, yes, this time you have made a great contribution, turn back and give you a team leader!"

Blood Wolf Tianzun smiled.

"Thank you Blood Wolf Heavenly Venerable!"

Yinsha said excitedly.

"Silver Sand Divine Lord, you ......"

The Blood Orchid Juggernaut and the rest of the Cloud Mist Mercenary Group were dumbfounded.

At this moment, they are still unclear!

The real traitor was the Silver Sand Divine Lord who had been slandering Ye Tian just now, and he was also the member of the group who had joined their Cloud Dream Mist Mercenary Regiment for nearly nine thousand years and was regarded as a companion of life and death!

"Silver Sand Divine Lord, why?"

Yun Lan Juggernaut's eyes were hideous, and he asked.

"No, why, because I am just a cosmic god secretly cultivated by the Blood Wolf Mist Mercenary Group, and I am good at hiding my emotions, so I was sent this mission to blend in with your Yunmeng Mist Mercenary Group. "

The Silver Sand God said.

"I see!"

Yunlan Juggernaut smiled bitterly.

She always thought that her audit standards were very good, and every member of the Yunmeng Mist Mercenary Group was a family, but now she realized that her so-called entry criteria were too flawed.

For example, the sin karma is low, if it is a cosmic god who has been secretly cultivated like the Silver Sand God Lord, there is almost no killing, and the sin karma is naturally low, but it does not mean that the other party is a good person.

"Lord Yunlan, I have ordered someone to arrange the Forbidden Sky Divine Array around, even if you have a special escape secret treasure, don't even think about escaping! This time, you are dead!"

Blood Wolf Tianzun said coldly.

Just when Yunlan Juggernaut and the others were desperate, Ye Tian spoke: "The farce should be over! I don't have so much time to play with you!"
